ext.description: Paste-only + on-disk encrypted editor for .env files. Activated via 'Reopen Editor With…' when a sibling .env.keys is present. Values are auto-encrypted on save and decrypted in the view so it looks like the normal variant — keys remain plaintext.
view.container.title: Vibecode .env Encryption
config.title: Vibecode .env Encryption
config.strategy.description: Encryption backend used when writing values. `none` stores plaintext (same as the normal variant). `dotenvx` encrypts values with DOTENV_PUBLIC_KEY and requires a sibling .env.keys file — bootstrap once with `npx dotenvx encrypt`.
config.strategy.none.description: No encryption — values stored as plaintext.
config.strategy.dotenvx.description: secp256k1 ECIES encryption, dotenvx-compatible. Requires DOTENV_PUBLIC_KEY in .env and a sibling .env.keys file.
config.strategy.infisical.description: (Stub — not implemented) Remote secret store. Values will be replaced by reference tokens. Falls back to `none` until the SDK is wired up.
command.enableEncryption.title: Vibecode - Enable Encryption (Generate .env.keys)
command.refreshHub.title: Vibecode - Refresh Encryption Hub
command.selectStrategy.title: Vibecode - Select Encryption Strategy
command.openEncrypted.title: Vibecode - Open in Encrypted Editor
